description.active: Browse live, unresolved prediction market assets accepting bets.
description.expired: Browse past prediction market assets awaiting resolution by price feeders.
description.mine: Prediction market assets you've created or interacted with.
description.portfolio: Prediction market assets currently held in your account balance.
description.margin: Active margin (call) positions on prediction market assets.

card.emptyActive: No active predictions available at the moment.
card.emptyExpired: No expired predictions available at the moment.
card.emptyMine: You have no predictions at the moment.
card.emptyPortfolio: You have no prediction market assets in your portfolio balance at the moment.
card.emptyMargin: You have no prediction market asset margin positions at the moment.

openInterest_help: Total collateral committed by all sellers betting against the outcome.

market.impliedProbability_help: Estimated chance the market assigns to the YES outcome, derived from open interest and settlement fund size.
market.expiredNote: Trading has ended for this market.
market.settlementFund_help: The collateral currently held in the settlement fund, awaiting resolution.
market.commission_help: Fee charged on each trade, paid in the backing asset.

price_feeders_content: The prediction can be resolved by either the witnesses, committee or private price feeders.
seller_content: Sellers bet against the prediction, If the prediction is false, sellers win by the settlement price going to 0.
buyer_content: Buyers bet for the prediction, If the prediction is true, buyers win by the settlement price going to 1.
admin_content: The house has additional controls for resolving the prediction.
winner_content: Winners who bought (true outcome) can settle the PMA for the 1x backing asset contents, Winners who sold (false outcome) don't need to do anything.

winner.settlementFund_help: The total collateral committed to this prediction market. Buyers who hold the winning outcome can claim a proportional share of this fund.
winner.yourPmaBalance_help: The number of prediction market asset tokens you currently hold. After the prediction resolves, each winning PMA can be settled for 1 unit of the backing asset.

not_expired: This prediction has not expired yet, so it's unable to be resolved.
already_resolved: This prediction has already been resolved.

issueDialog.title: Issuing prediction market assets
issueDialog.description: In order to bet against the outcome, you first need to issue the prediction market asset tokens.
issueDialog.qtyContent: The quantity of tokens you want to issue in this prediction market, Issued tokens can be sold, enabling you to bet against predictions.
issueDialog.existingContent: This is how many of these prediction market asset tokens you've already issued.
issueDialog.totalContent: This is the total amount of collateral you'll have committed to this prediction market asset.
issueDialog.receivingContent: This is approximately the total amount of prediction market asset tokens you'll get in return for this trade.

sellDialog.qtyContent: The quantity of tokens you want to sell in this prediction market, betting against the outcome of the prediction.
sellDialog.receivingContent: This is approximately the total amount of backing asset you'll get in return for this trade.
sellDialog.title: Selling prediction market assets
sellDialog.description: To bet against the outcome of the prediction, you need to sell the prediction market asset tokens which you previously issued.
sellDialog.expiryContent: Your limit order will remain active on the DEX for this long before no longer existing, If you select 'fill or kill' then if there's no matching DEX sell limit order the operation will fail, saving your time and fees.

buyDialog.title: Buying prediction market assets
buyDialog.description: To bet in favour of the outcome of the prediction, you need to buy the prediction market asset tokens from a seller who is betting against the outcome.
buyDialog.receivingContent: This is approximately the total amount of prediction market asset tokens you'll get in return for this trade.

claimDialog.qtyContent: The quantity of prediction market assets you want to settle back into the backing asset.

resolveDialog.title: Resolving prediction
resolveDialog.description: The prediction has expired and is ready to be resolved, Please select the correct outcome of the prediction.
resolveDialog.outcomeContent: The outcome of the prediction, If the prediction is true, buyers win by the settlement price going to 1, If the prediction is false, sellers win by the settlement price going to 0.

priceFeederDialog.title: Set price feeders
priceFeederDialog.description: Set the price feeders for this prediction, Price feeders are responsible for providing the settlement price for the prediction.
priceFeederDialog.priceFeedersContent: The price feeders for this prediction, Price feeders are responsible for providing the settlement price for the prediction.

addPriceFeederDialog.title: Add price feeder
addPriceFeederDialog.description: Add a price feeder to this prediction, Price feeders are responsible for providing the settlement price for the prediction.
addPriceFeederDialog.accountContent: The account which will be responsible for providing the settlement price for the prediction.

feederDialog.title: Resolving prediction market via price feed
feederDialog.description: The prediction has expired and is ready to be resolved via a published price feed.
feederDialog.outcomeContent: The outcome of the prediction, If the prediction is true, buyers win by the settlement price going to 1, If the prediction is false, sellers win by the settlement price going to 0.

json.title: Asset JSON
json.description: Raw JSON data for the selected entry.

blockConfirm.title: Block this issuer?
blockConfirm.description: Prediction markets created by this account will be hidden from your view. You can unblock them at any time.
